### Fix 1

Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```
  180            <Button onClick={onClose} type="submit" variant="link">

```

### Fix 2
Line: 132
Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

Props that move to child components:
  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

Removed props (move to child component as children or remove):
  actions -> map to appropriate child component (any)
  bodyAriaLabel -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  header -> ModalHeader (as children, ReactNode)
  showClose -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

Add imports: ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter from '@patternfly/react-core'

Remove imports (if no longer used): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core

New props on replacement:

Removed props (no replacement equivalent): actions, bodyAriaLabel, bodyAriaRole, description, footer, hasNoBodyWrapper, header, help, showClose, title, titleIconVariant, titleLabel

### Fix 3
Lines: 177, 180
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 177):
  176          <ActionGroup>
  177            <Button isDisabled={numEvents < 1} onClick={onSubmit} type="submit" variant="primary">
  178              {t('Attach')}

  (line 180):
  179            </Button>
  180            <Button onClick={onClose} type="submit" variant="link">
  181              {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 142
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  141              <HelperText>
  142                <HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">{t('No events')}</HelperTextItem>
  143              </HelperText>

```

### Fix 5
Line: 19
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
   18    Spinner,
   19    Text,
   20  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/lightspeed-console/source/src/components/AttachEventsModal.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 177, 180 - Button variant type changed): The `variant` values `"primary"` and `"link"` are both still valid in the new type union. No actual code change needed — these values exist in both old and new types. The change just adds `"stateful"` as a new option.

**Fix 2** (Line 131-137 - Modal family migration): The `<Modal>` at line 131 uses a `title` prop which needs to move to `<ModalHeader>`. The children `<Text>` and `<Form>` need to be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`. Looking at line 131, the Modal uses `title={t('Configure events attachment')}` — this needs to move to `<ModalHeader>`. The children content (lines 132-184) should be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`. Need to import `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` from `@patternfly/react-core`. But wait — line 31 imports `Modal` from `./Modal` (a local component), not from `@patternfly/react-core`. The rule says `parentFrom: ./Modal`. Let me check if the rule still applies. The rule says to wrap children in `<ModalBody>` — the local `./Modal` wrapper likely passes through to PF's Modal. I should wrap the Modal children in `<ModalBody>` and move `title` to `<ModalHeader>`.

**Fix 3** (Lines 177, 180 - icon children to prop for Button): Looking at the Button content — line 177-178 has `{t('Attach')}` (text only, no icon) and line 180-181 has `{t('Cancel')}` (text only, no icon). There are NO icon elements in these Buttons. No change needed.

**Fix 4** (Line 142 - icon children to prop for HelperTextItem): The content is `{t('No events')}` which is text, not an icon. No change needed.

**Fix 5** (Line 19 - Text → Content migration): Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>` in JSX usage and update the import from `Text` to `Content`.

Let me now apply the changes:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Button.variant type changed (`primary`, `link`)
**No change needed.** The values `"primary"` and `"link"` are both present in the new type union. The type change only adds `"stateful"` as a new option. No code modification required.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration
**Applied.**
- Removed `title` prop from `<Modal>` on line 131.
- Added `<ModalHeader title={t('Configure events attachment')} />` as the first child of `<Modal>`.
- Wrapped all remaining children (`<Content>` and `<Form>`) in `<ModalBody>`.
- Added `ModalBody` and `ModalHeader` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import statement.

### Fix 3 — icon children to prop for Button
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` elements at the affected lines contain only text (`{t('Attach')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), not icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No icon-to-prop migration applies.

### Fix 4 — icon children to prop for HelperTextItem
**No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 142 contains only text (`{t('No events')}`), not an icon element. No icon-to-prop migration applies.

### Fix 5 — Text → Content migration
**Applied.**
- Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import statement.
- Replaced `<Text>` and `</Text>` with `<Content>` and `</Content>` in the JSX (line 132/136).

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Button.variant type changed (`primary`, `link`)
**No change needed.** The values `"primary"` and `"link"` are both present in the new type union. The type change only adds `"stateful"` as a new option. No code modification required.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration
**Applied.**
- Removed `title` prop from `<Modal>` on line 131.
- Added `<ModalHeader title={t('Configure events attachment')} />` as the first child of `<Modal>`.
- Wrapped all remaining children (`<Content>` and `<Form>`) in `<ModalBody>`.
- Added `ModalBody` and `ModalHeader` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import statement.

### Fix 3 — icon children to prop for Button
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` elements at the affected lines contain only text (`{t('Attach')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), not icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No icon-to-prop migration applies.

### Fix 4 — icon children to prop for HelperTextItem
**No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 142 contains only text (`{t('No events')}`), not an icon element. No icon-to-prop migration applies.

### Fix 5 — Text → Content migration
**Applied.**

- Replaced `<Text>` and `</Text>` with `<Content>` and `</Content>` in the JSX (line 132/136).
